title: WynnCat
description: Modpack aiming to create a more immersive and customizable Wynncraft experience while remaining playable
body:
# What is this?
This is a mod pack attempting to create a more immersive [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/) experience while remaining playable. By this I mean adding stuff in such a way that the game feels the same as playing on a vanilla client but with lots of QOL tweaks.

It includes QOL mods, texture packs, and shader support for your viewing pleasure.

I higly recommend [Wynncraft Retextured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wynncraft-retextured) for custom armor set textures.

## Main Features
- The usual optimisation mods
- [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils)
- [Voices of Wynn](https://voicesofwynn.com/)
- Fancy animations :3


# How do I remove my content?
If any devs want their content removed, contact me at contact.polycat@proton.me
